title: LLM Avalanche
description: **NOTE: [Scale By the Bay](https://scale.bythebay.io) CFP is open through 6/16!** **Update**: the *Community Showcase* is open! Apply to get a table to present to the attendees or do a lightning talk at the *LLM Open Mike*: [https://chief.sc/llma23showcase](https://chief.sc/llma23showcase) I'm really happy to announce the [#LLMs](https://www.linkedin.com/feed/hashtag/?keywords=llms&highlightedUpdateUrns=urn%3Ali%3Aactivity%3A7074484548721377280) Avalanche [#meetup](https://www.linkedin.com/feed/hashtag/?keywords=meetup&highlightedUpdateUrns=urn%3Ali%3Aactivity%3A7074484548721377280) that we will be running in conjunction with [#DataAISummit](https://www.linkedin.com/feed/hashtag/?keywords=dataaisummit&highlightedUpdateUrns=urn%3Ali%3Aactivity%3A7074484548721377280) on June 26th, at 5 pm at [The Contemporary Jewish Museum](https://www.linkedin.com/company/the-contemporary-jewish-museum/) (right next to [Moscone Center](https://www.linkedin.com/company/mosconecenter/)). We have some amazing technical LLM panelists and speakers from [Anthropic](https://www.linkedin.com/company/anthropicresearch/), [Google DeepMind](https://www.linkedin.com/company/googledeepmind/), [MosaicML](https://www.linkedin.com/company/mosaicml/), [Robust Intelligence](https://www.linkedin.com/company/robust-intelligence/), [Claypot AI](https://www.linkedin.com/company/claypotai/), [John Snow Labs](https://www.linkedin.com/company/johnsnowlabs/), [LangChain](https://www.linkedin.com/company/langchain/), [Numbers Station AI](https://www.linkedin.com/company/numbers-station-ai/), [LlamaIndex](https://www.linkedin.com/company/llamaindex/), [#Lamini](https://www.linkedin.com/feed/hashtag/?keywords=lamini&highlightedUpdateUrns=urn%3Ali%3Aactivity%3A7074484548721377280), [IBM](https://www.linkedin.com/company/ibm/), and [Databricks](https://www.linkedin.com/company/databricks/)! And there will be more announced shortly! Join the fun and festivities and donate to a great cause, too! The first wave of speakers include: * [Aakanksha Chowdhery, Ph.D.](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ACoAAANWasEBiJ-k6HKnicOQ5pS67GiwJoLEqtM) ([Google You have to register at [avalanche.fm](https://avalanche.fm) in order to attend. The RSVPs ar elimited.
